title: Operational Reality Event
description: Minimal structure required for an event to be considered operationally real within the AI Philosophical Framework.

decision.description: Agent decision that initiated the event

cost.description: Resource expenditure, risk, or sacrifice generated by the decision

trace.description: Observable effect or record that allows reconstruction of the event

time.description: Timestamp or temporal exposure of the event

agent.description: Human, institutional, or AI entity responsible for the decision

context.description: Optional contextual description of the event
